goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the type of 'hotel' and should 'include free wifi'.
The hotel should be in the 'expensive' price range and should 'include free parking'.
Once you find the 'hotel' you want to book it for '7 people' and '2 nights' starting from 'wednesday'.
Make sure you get the 'reference number'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should 'leave after 16:30' and should depart from 'london liverpool street'.
The train should go to 'cambridge' and should be on 'the same day as the hotel booking'.
Once you find the train you want to make a booking for 'the same group of people'.
Make sure you get the 'reference number'.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the type of hotel and should include free wifi
The hotel should be in the expensive price range and should include free parking
Once you find the hotel you want to book it for 7 people and 2 nights starting from wednesday
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for a train. The train should leave after 16:30 and should depart from london liverpool street
The train should go to cambridge and should be on the same day as the hotel booking
Once you find the train you want to make a booking for the same group of people
Make sure you get the reference number
